subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #074 The Relativity of Good and Evil
subcodes.first_line: To explain the truth of this matter is difficult indeed. Know that created things are of two kinds
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیان حقیقت اینمسئله بسیار مشکل است بدانکه کائنات بر دو قسم است
subcodes.subjects: @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
